data.title: Write RED tests for REBASE_HEAD filtering in capture-review-diff.sh
data.description:
## Description

Add 2 test functions to tests/hooks/test-merge-aware-diff.sh:

1. test_capture_diff_rebase_scopes_to_worktree: Create git repo (mktemp -d, trap cleanup). Simulate REBASE_HEAD state (.git/REBASE_HEAD + .git/rebase-merge/onto + .git/rebase-merge/orig-head — NOT .git/ORIG_HEAD). Invoke capture-review-diff.sh. Inspect output diff to verify it only contains worktree-branch changes.

2. test_capture_diff_rebase_failsafe: REBASE_HEAD without onto file. Verify fallback to full diff.

IMPORTANT: Write orig-head to .git/rebase-merge/orig-head, NOT .git/ORIG_HEAD.

## TDD Requirement
Tests FAIL (RED) — no REBASE_HEAD handling in capture-review-diff.sh.

## File Impact
- tests/hooks/test-merge-aware-diff.sh (modify)
- .test-index (modify — add RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] At least 2 new rebase test functions
  Verify: grep -c "test_capture_diff_rebase" tests/hooks/test-merge-aware-diff.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'
- [ ] .test-index RED marker added
  Verify: grep -q 'capture-review-diff.*test_capture_diff_rebase' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
